qids.subject: Compiler Design
qids.prose: Consider the following two statements: P: Every regular grammar is LL(1) Q: Every regular set has a LR(1) grammar Which of the following is TRUE? A. Both P and Q are true B. P is true and Q is false C. P is false and Q is true D. Both P and Q are false
